narrative:
Geauga County has 66,758 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.4% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.3% D−R vs -23.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
